title: Fix transactional async side-effects in DecisionService and PostConsumer
description: Replace CompletableFuture.runAsync() inside @Transactional methods with @TransactionalEventListener(phase=AFTER_COMMIT) to ensure async embedding/SSE operations execute only after transaction commit. Current code fires async threads before commit, risking reads of uncommitted data or missing nodes entirely.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN async embedding/SSE triggered → THEN executes only after main transaction commits; WHEN transaction rolls back → THEN no async side effects fire; SHALL use @TransactionalEventListener(AFTER_COMMIT) or equivalent commit-aware mechanism; ref: specs/embedding-model-integration/spec.md:14-17; specs/sse-event-push/spec.md:10-21; validate: mvn test -Dtest=PostConsumerEmbeddingUnitTest,DecisionServiceBranchUnitTest,DecisionServiceMergeUnitTest
review_initial_requirements: Verify TransactionalEventListener registered for correct event types; ensure embedding and SSE events both use commit-aware pattern; confirm no remaining CompletableFuture.runAsync in @Transactional context; ref: Codex+Gemini cross-validated
review_regression_requirements: Embedding still written after Human_Post/AI_Consensus creation; SSE events still pushed for NODE_CREATED/EDGE_CREATED/DECISION_COMPLETE; existing async pipeline integration tests pass; ref: specs/embedding-model-integration/spec.md:6-17; specs/sse-event-push/spec.md:10-21
notes: Codex+Gemini交叉验证; 影响: embedding永久缺失 + SSE推送不可见数据; 与RVW-07(线程池)关联可合并重构; picked_reason:P0且事务异步副作用高风险; done_at:2026-03-11; evidence:mvn test -Dtest=PostConsumerEmbeddingUnitTest,DecisionServiceBranchUnitTest,DecisionServiceMergeUnitTest (pass)

title: Fix JWT filter exception handling for blank sub claim
description: JwtAuthenticationFilter throws BadCredentialsException when sub is blank, but executes before ExceptionTranslationFilter, causing 500 HTML instead of 401 JSON. Add catch(AuthenticationException) in doFilterInternal to explicitly call writeErrorResponse.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN JWT token has blank/empty sub claim → THEN returns 401 JSON ApiResponse (not 500 HTML); WHEN any AuthenticationException in filter → THEN writeErrorResponse called with proper ApiResponse JSON; ref: specs/jwt-auth/spec.md:17-20; validate: mvn test -Dtest=JwtAuthenticationIntegrationTest
review_initial_requirements: Verify catch block covers all AuthenticationException subtypes in filter; ensure ObjectMapper used for error serialization (consistent with JWT-04 pattern); confirm blank vs null sub both handled; ref: Gemini发现
review_regression_requirements: Valid JWT still works; expired JWT still returns 401; missing auth header still returns 401; existing JwtAuthenticationIntegrationTest pass; ref: specs/jwt-auth/spec.md:6-20
notes: Gemini发现; JWT-04已部分修复sub validation但异常冒泡路径未完全覆盖; picked_reason:P0且改动面小,可快速闭环; done_at:2026-03-11; evidence:mvn test -Dtest=JwtAuthenticationIntegrationTest (pass)

title: Add _deleted filter to DecisionService validation queries
description: DecisionService.findByNodeId/findAllByNodeIdIn used for merge/branch validation do not filter _deleted nodes. Soft-deleted nodes can still participate in decisions, breaking data consistency with other soft-delete filtered services.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN merge/branch decision references soft-deleted node → THEN decision rejected with appropriate error; ALL DecisionService validation queries SHALL filter WHERE NOT coalesce(n._deleted, false); ref: specs/decision-rollback/spec.md:26-28; validate: mvn test -Dtest=DecisionServiceBranchUnitTest,DecisionServiceMergeUnitTest
review_initial_requirements: Verify all findByNodeId/findAllByNodeIdIn usages in DecisionService add _deleted filter; check consistency with RSD-02 pattern; ref: Codex发现
review_regression_requirements: Active nodes still participate in decisions normally; merge/branch with valid active nodes succeeds; existing decision tests pass; ref: specs/decision-rollback/spec.md:26-28
notes: Codex发现; RSD-02覆盖了NodeQueryService/EmbeddingService/AssociationService/AuditService但遗漏DecisionService校验路径

title: Add RabbitMQ publisher confirms + return callback
description: RabbitTemplate only sets mandatory flag without confirm/return callbacks. convertAndSend is async and returns immediately — PostController 202 does not guarantee message persisted by broker. Unroutable messages silently lost.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN message published → THEN publisher confirm received before returning 202; WHEN message unroutable → THEN return callback triggered and logged; SHALL use CorrelationData future or RabbitTemplate#invoke for synchronous confirm; ref: specs/async-post-pipeline/spec.md:7-9; validate: mvn test -Dtest=AsyncPostPipelineIntegrationTest
review_initial_requirements: D3 design intent is publisher confirms for at-least-once (design.md:53) but implementation incomplete; verify CorrelationData or invoke pattern; ref: Codex+Gemini交叉验证
review_regression_requirements: Successful post submission still returns 202; RabbitMQ unavailable still returns 503; existing async pipeline tests pass; ref: specs/async-post-pipeline/spec.md:10-12
notes: Codex+Gemini交叉验证; D3设计意图为publisher confirms但实现未完成

title: Replace manual retry with Spring AMQP RetryOperationsInterceptor
description: PostConsumer handleFailure manually increments retry count and republishes with zero delay, exhausting 3 retries in milliseconds. Transient errors (Neo4j lock, network blip) have no chance to recover. Replace with Spring AMQP native exponential backoff.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN Neo4j write fails transiently → THEN retry with exponential backoff (e.g. 1s/2s/4s); WHEN 3 retries exhausted → THEN routes to DLQ via native mechanism; SHALL use Spring AMQP RetryOperationsInterceptor or equivalent; ref: specs/async-post-pipeline/spec.md:25-34; validate: mvn test -Dtest=AsyncPostPipelineIntegrationTest
review_initial_requirements: Verify exponential backoff configuration; confirm native DLQ routing replaces manual routing; ref: Gemini发现
review_regression_requirements: Permanent failures still reach DLQ; consumer still processes valid messages; idempotency via request_id MERGE preserved; ref: specs/async-post-pipeline/spec.md:17-24
notes: Gemini发现; 与RVW-12(手动DLQ路由)相关建议合并修复

title: Deduplicate edges in lineage/children Cypher queries
description: LINEAGE_QUERY and CHILDREN_QUERY use reduce() to aggregate relationships from multiple paths. Diamond/convergent DAG paths produce duplicate edges in response. Use UNWIND + collect(DISTINCT rel) for deduplication.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN diamond DAG queried → THEN edges array contains each relationship exactly once; SHALL use UNWIND + collect(DISTINCT rel) or equivalent deduplication in Cypher; ref: specs/lineage-graph-topology/spec.md:18-21; validate: mvn test -Dtest=LineageGraphTopologyIntegrationTest
review_initial_requirements: Verify DISTINCT applied at relationship level (not node level); confirm EdgePayload equality based on source+target+type; ref: Codex+Gemini交叉验证
review_regression_requirements: Linear lineage unaffected; root node returns empty edges; soft-deleted excluded; existing topology tests pass; ref: specs/lineage-graph-topology/spec.md; specs/node-query-api/spec.md
notes: Codex+Gemini交叉验证; tasks.md:8(LGT-01.6)要求diamond去重但当前实现仅nodes去重edges未去重

title: Define dedicated executor for embedding async tasks
description: CompletableFuture.runAsync() defaults to ForkJoinPool.commonPool(). Embedding HTTP calls (SiliconFlow API) are blocking I/O and will exhaust common pool under load, starving all async operations across the JVM.
acceptance_criteria: SHALL define @Bean("embeddingTaskExecutor") ThreadPoolTaskExecutor with configurable pool size; ALL embedding async tasks SHALL use dedicated executor instead of commonPool; validate: mvn test -Dtest=PostConsumerEmbeddingUnitTest
review_initial_requirements: Verify ThreadPoolTaskExecutor configured with appropriate core/max pool size for blocking I/O; confirm all runAsync calls pass dedicated executor; ref: Gemini+Codex辅助确认
review_regression_requirements: Embedding async write still works; consumer pipeline throughput not degraded; ref: specs/embedding-model-integration/spec.md:6-17
notes: Gemini发现Codex辅助确认; 与RVW-01(事务后执行)关联可合并重构

title: Fix limitTopology to preserve graph connectivity
description: limitTopology sorts descendants by createdAt DESC globally and truncates to limit. Parent nodes may be dropped while children kept, destroying connecting edges and returning orphaned/disconnected nodes.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN limit applied to topology → THEN returned graph is connected (no orphaned nodes); SHALL use BFS from root or equivalent traversal-aware limiting preserving referential integrity; ref: specs/subgraph-expansion/spec.md:14-16; validate: mvn test -Dtest=ChildrenExpansionIntegrationTest
review_initial_requirements: Verify BFS traversal preserves parent-child connectivity; confirm limit respects graph structure not just timestamp ordering; ref: Gemini发现
review_regression_requirements: Children expansion default behavior unchanged; leaf node single-node result still works; existing children tests pass; ref: specs/subgraph-expansion/spec.md:19-24
notes: Gemini发现; 当前按createdAt全局截断破坏引用完整性

title: Filter _deleted nodes in target_node_id validation
description: PostController/PostService target_node_id existence check does not exclude soft-deleted nodes, inconsistent with other read interfaces' _deleted filtering strategy (RSD-02/03/04/05/06).
acceptance_criteria: WHEN POST /api/posts with target_node_id pointing to _deleted=true node → THEN returns 400 "target_node_id not found"; ref: specs/post-submission-api/spec.md:14-16; validate: mvn test -Dtest=ServiceLayerUnitTest
review_initial_requirements: Verify validation query adds _deleted filter consistent with RSD-02 pattern; ref: Codex发现
review_regression_requirements: Valid active target_node_id still accepted and stored; existing post submission tests pass; ref: specs/post-submission-api/spec.md:10-13
notes: Codex发现; 与RVW-03(DecisionService _deleted filter)属同类问题

title: Design scalable SSE emitter registry for multi-instance
description: SseEventService uses local CopyOnWriteArrayList — in multi-instance deployment events on Instance A won't reach clients on Instance B. Leverage existing RabbitMQ Fanout exchange for inter-instance broadcast.
acceptance_criteria: SHALL support multi-instance SSE event broadcast via RabbitMQ Fanout exchange or equivalent pub/sub mechanism; single-instance behavior unchanged; ref: design.md:100
review_initial_requirements: D5 acknowledges migration to Redis pub/sub for scale (design.md:100); evaluate RabbitMQ Fanout as interim since RabbitMQ already provisioned; ref: Gemini发现
review_regression_requirements: Single-instance SSE behavior unchanged; heartbeat/disconnect management preserved; ref: specs/sse-event-push/spec.md:22-36
notes: Gemini发现; design.md:100已标注SSE连接限制风险; 当前单实例阶段可降低优先级

title: Replace CopyOnWriteArrayList with ConcurrentHashMap for SSE emitters
description: CopyOnWriteArrayList.remove() is O(N) per operation. High-concurrency disconnects cause CPU spikes with thousands of connections. ConcurrentHashMap provides O(1) add/remove.
acceptance_criteria: SHALL use ConcurrentHashMap<String, SseEmitter> for O(1) add/remove; emitter lifecycle callbacks (timeout/error/completion) preserved; validate: mvn test -Dtest=SseIntegrationTest
review_initial_requirements: Verify ConcurrentHashMap keying strategy (connection ID or user ID); ensure thread safety for broadcast iteration during concurrent modifications; ref: Gemini发现
review_regression_requirements: SSE connection/disconnect behavior unchanged; heartbeat reaches all clients; ref: specs/sse-event-push/spec.md:22-36
notes: Gemini发现; 与RVW-10(注册表可扩展性)可合并重构

title: Use native RabbitMQ DLQ routing instead of manual republish
description: PostConsumer manually routes failed messages to DLX via rabbitTemplate, but RabbitMqConfig already defines x-dead-letter-exchange on the queue. Use channel.basicReject(deliveryTag, false) to trigger native DLQ mechanism and remove manual routing code.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN message fails after max retries → THEN routed to DLQ via native x-dead-letter-exchange (not manual republish); SHALL remove manual DLQ routing code from PostConsumer; ref: specs/async-post-pipeline/spec.md:29-34; validate: mvn test -Dtest=AsyncPostPipelineIntegrationTest
review_initial_requirements: Verify native DLQ routing activated by basicReject; confirm DLQ message headers contain failure context for investigation; ref: Gemini发现
review_regression_requirements: Failed messages still reach DLQ; DLQ message payload intact for manual investigation; consumer processes valid messages normally; ref: specs/async-post-pipeline/spec.md:29-34
notes: Gemini发现; 与RVW-05(重试退避)关联建议合并修复
